task.title: Capture CodeWiki v2 operating model and roadmap
task.summary: CodeWiki v2 decisions are now durable wiki knowledge and mapped to executable roadmap tasks.

goal.outcome: The wiki records the v2 canonical/view model, product split, memory policy, subagent/agency/think-code roles, and sanitation/versioning policy as roadmap-backed intent.
acceptance: V2 decisions are captured in canonical knowledge docs, not only chat history.
Product knowledge is split or prepared for users, stories, and surfaces.
The system knowledge names the canonical/view boundary and view consumption model.
Roadmap tasks cover v2 migration, views, architecture graph, subagents, agency, think-code, and sanitation/release policy.
codewiki_state reports the new roadmap without drift.
non_goals: Implement the full v2 storage migration.
Render architecture diagrams in the status panel.
Rename all code-level projection terminology immediately.

delta.desired: V2 direction is captured as wiki truth and mapped to concrete roadmap tasks.
delta.current: V2 direction exists in chat but not yet as durable wiki knowledge or executable roadmap tasks.
delta.closure: Knowledge docs and roadmap tasks reflect the agreed v2 operating model.
